metadata.title: 6th Pass Post-Run Fix v2 — Silent Failures, Metric Keys, Config Wiring
metadata.priority: P0 — fixes block scientific validity of factorial results

phase.name: Critical Silent Failures
phase.description: Fix 4 CRITICAL bugs that cause production data loss. Each hides behind except Exception + continue, making training "succeed" with garbage or missing results.

task.title: Post-training plugin failure must raise, not return empty model_paths
task.problem: SWAG plugin fails → returns {status: "error", model_paths: []}. Caller never checks status. Scientific claim of UQ is FALSE.
task.red: test_post_training_plugin_error_raises — mock plugin.execute() to raise RuntimeError. Assert post_training_subflow raises (not returns status=error). File: tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_critical_silent_failures.py
task.green: In post_training_flow.py:334, replace the dict return in except block with: `raise PostTrainingPluginError(f"Plugin {plugin_name} failed") from exc` Define PostTrainingPluginError in the same file or in exceptions.py.

task.title: External test DataLoader failure must raise, not fall back to raw pairs
task.problem: DeepVess DataLoader construction fails → falls back to raw dict pairs. Paper reports test/deepvess/dice but metrics computed on unprocessed data.
task.red: test_external_dataloader_failure_raises — mock _build_loader_from_dicts to raise. Assert the exception propagates (not caught + fallback to pairs). File: tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_critical_silent_failures.py
task.green: In analysis_flow.py:2133, remove the except block that falls back to raw pairs. Let the exception propagate. Caller handles it at the flow level.

task.title: Remove tracking_uri hardcoded "mlruns" fallback (Rule #22)
task.problem: config.get("tracking_uri", "mlruns") silently falls back to file-based MLflow. On cloud VMs, metrics go to ephemeral disk and are lost.
task.red: test_no_hardcoded_tracking_uri_fallback — AST check that train_flow.py does NOT contain any string literal "mlruns" as a default value. File: tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_critical_silent_failures.py
task.green: Replace config.get("tracking_uri", "mlruns") with resolve_tracking_uri() (already imported in the file). No fallback — fail loudly.

task.title: Fix builder.py eval_fold2_dsc vs eval/fold2/dsc format mismatch
task.source: Agent 3, GAP 2 — PROMOTED from Phase 3 to P0
task.problem: builder.py:243 checks for "eval_fold2_dsc" (underscore format). tracking.py:774 logs "eval/fold{fold_id}/{metric}" (slash format). The builder NEVER FINDS completed runs — silently returns empty ensemble. This is production-blocking: ensemble comparison table has zero rows.
task.red: test_builder_metric_format_matches_tracking — create MLflow run with tracking.py's actual metric key format, then call builder's discovery. Assert the run IS found (currently fails due to format mismatch). File: tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_critical_silent_failures.py
task.green: In builder.py:243, change the metric key check from underscore format ("eval_fold2_dsc") to slash format ("eval/fold2/dsc") matching what tracking.py actually logs. Use MetricKeys constants.

phase.name: Config-to-Code Wiring
phase.description: Wire ORPHAN cloud config values into run_factorial.sh. The config chain is validated by tests but the last mile (script reads config) is broken.

task.title: Wire cloud config into run_factorial.sh (parallel_submissions + rate_limit + sync_sky_config)
task.source: Agent 4, Findings #3 + #5 — MERGED from v1 Tasks 2.1+2.2
task.problem: configs/cloud/gcp_spot.yaml defines parallel_submissions:4 and rate_limit_seconds:5 but run_factorial.sh hardcodes sleep 5 and launches sequentially. infrastructure.cloud_config is validated but never loaded.
task.red: test_run_factorial_reads_parallel_from_config — verify script extracts parallel_submissions from the config chain (factorial → cloud → fallback=1). test_run_factorial_reads_rate_limit — verify sleep uses config value. test_run_factorial_calls_sync_sky_config — verify controller sync happens. File: tests/v2/unit/config/test_infra_params_wired.py
task.green: At start of run_factorial.sh (after CONFIG_FILE is set): 1. Extract cloud_config name from factorial YAML 2. Load configs/cloud/{name}.yaml 3. Extract PARALLEL_SUBMISSIONS and RATE_LIMIT_SECONDS 4. Call sync_sky_config.py with the cloud config path 5. Replace hardcoded sleep 5 with sleep ${RATE_LIMIT_SECONDS} 6. Replace sequential loop with background job pool (wait -n) Insertion point: after line 148 (where CONFIG_FILE is parsed).

phase.name: Metric Key Standardization
phase.description: Migrate all flows to use MetricKeys constants for eval metric keys. Phase 1 Task 1.4 fixes the immediate builder mismatch; this phase ensures ALL flows use the same constants (prevents future drift).

task.title: Add EVAL_FOLD_PREFIX and EVAL_TEST_PREFIX to MetricKeys
task.red: test_metric_keys_has_eval_fold_prefix — verify MetricKeys has constants for the eval fold key pattern used by tracking.py and builder.py. File: tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_metric_key_consistency.py
task.green: Add to metric_keys.py: EVAL_FOLD_PREFIX = "eval/fold" (e.g., eval/fold0/dsc) EVAL_TEST_PREFIX = "test" (e.g., test/deepvess/all/dsc)

task.title: Migrate all flows to MetricKeys constants (no raw eval/ strings)
task.red: test_no_raw_eval_strings_in_flows — AST check that no flow file contains raw string literals matching "eval/" or "eval_fold" — must use MetricKeys. File: tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_metric_key_consistency.py
task.green: Replace raw "eval/" and "eval_fold" strings in: - builder.py:243 (already fixed in 1.4, ensure uses MetricKeys constant) - evaluation_runner.py:289-312 (use EVAL_FOLD_PREFIX / EVAL_TEST_PREFIX) - biostatistics_duckdb.py:394-431 (use MetricKeys constants in SQL queries)

phase.name: Cross-Flow Contracts
phase.description: Enforce checkpoint naming and experiment name contracts between flows. All tests in one file: test_cross_flow_contracts.py.

task.title: Define canonical checkpoint filename in constants.py
task.red: TestCheckpointNaming::test_train_and_post_training_use_same_filename — verify train_flow and post_training_flow reference the SAME checkpoint filename constant (no fallback chain to best.ckpt). File: tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_cross_flow_contracts.py
task.green: Add CHECKPOINT_BEST_FILENAME = "best_val_loss.pth" to constants.py. In post_training_flow.py:87, remove "best.ckpt" from the fallback list. Both flows use the constant.

task.title: Remove ALL hardcoded "minivess_training" experiment names
task.source: Agent 3, GAP 4 — expanded to cover all occurrences
task.red: TestExperimentNaming::test_no_hardcoded_experiment_name_in_flows — AST check that NO flow file contains the string literal "minivess_training" outside of comments/docstrings. Must use resolve_experiment_name(). Cover: deploy_flow.py:346+355, dashboard_flow.py:470, any others found. File: tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_cross_flow_contracts.py
task.green: Replace every "minivess_training" with resolve_experiment_name(EXPERIMENT_TRAINING). Import from constants.py (already available in all flow files).

phase.name: Error Path Coverage
phase.description: Write tests exercising the except Exception: paths identified by Agent 2. All tests in ONE file to avoid tiny single-test files.

task.title: Test error paths: MLflow creation, metadata collection, setup timing
task.red:
test_mlflow_run_creation_failure_is_loud — mock mlflow.set_experiment to raise MlflowException. Verify logged at ERROR (not WARNING).
test_git_hash_failure_is_logged — mock subprocess.run to raise FileNotFoundError (git not found). Verify logged at WARNING with exc_info.
test_setup_timing_parse_failure_logged — verify train_flow.py:904-905 bare `except: pass` is replaced with `except Exception as exc: logger.warning(...)`.
File: tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_error_path_coverage.py
task.green: 1. train_flow.py:904-905: change bare `except:` to `except Exception: logger.warning("Setup timing parse failed", exc_info=True)` 2. Verify MLflow and metadata paths already log at appropriate levels (may already be correct)

item.reason: ORPHAN keys are fixed by Phase 2 wiring, not by comment documentation

deferred.item: Task 6.2: Config consumption tests (YAML comments not testable)

item.reason: One-time operational issue, cloud-specific, not data integrity

deferred.item: Task 6.3: GCP quota preflight check (nice-to-have, separate PR)

item.reason: File existence in repo ≠ file existence in Docker image

deferred.item: Task 6.1: Docker image content tests (should be integration test, not unit)

execution-order.step: Phase 1 (4 CRITICAL bugs) — MUST complete first
Phase 2 + Phase 3 (parallel — config wiring + metric keys)
Phase 4 (contracts — depends on Phase 3 MetricKeys additions)
Phase 5 (error paths — independent, can run anytime after Phase 1)
Docker rebuild + GAR push (after all code changes)

expected-outcomes.outcome: 0 CRITICAL silent failures (SWAG, DataLoader, tracking_uri, metric format)
All metric keys use MetricKeys constants (no raw strings)
No hardcoded "minivess_training" in any flow file
~15 new tests (4 critical + 3 config + 4 metric + 2 contract + 3 error)

issue.title: Metric key eval_fold2_dsc vs eval/fold2/dsc format mismatch in builder.py
issue.label: bug

issue.title: Post-training plugin error silently returns empty model_paths
issue.label: bug

issue.title: External test DataLoader fallback masks evaluation failures
issue.label: bug

issue.title: Hardcoded experiment names in deploy_flow, dashboard_flow
issue.label: bug
